title: Bradley Diebner
compiled_truth: Bradley Diebner is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-08-05 to 2001-11-25), Bradley Diebner sent 17 and received 271 emails, totalling 288 interactions. Top correspondents: [Tana Jones](people/tana-jones) (14), [Tom Moran](people/tom-moran) (11), [Lisa Lees](people/lisa-lees) (11), [Stephanie Sever](people/stephanie-sever) (10), [Brant Reves](people/brant-reves) (9).
